name: Shoals Technologies Group, Inc.
business: Shoals Technologies Group is a leading design-engineering company and manufacturer of advanced electrical infrastructure solutions for mission critical applications across solar photovoltaic (PV), BESS, and data center power systems. The company primarily sells to engineering, procurement and construction firms (EPCs) for use in large solar and BESS projects in the United States.
sellsTo: clean grid connected energy (solar, BESS) end market
data center and mission-critical electrical infrastructure end market
namedSuppliers: Prysmian Cables and Systems USA, LLC

exposures.sentence: Shoals Technologies Group is a leading design-engineering company and manufacturer of advanced electrical infrastructure solutions for mission critical applications across solar photovoltaic (PV), BESS, and data center power systems.

Shoals Technologies Group is a leading design-engineering company and manufacturer of advanced electrical infrastructure solutions for mission critical applications across solar photovoltaic (PV), BESS, and data center power systems.
We have a focus in two end-markets: (1) clean, grid connected energy and (2) data center + mission-critical electrical infrastructure.
we are seeing an acceleration of artificial intelligence (AI) adoption, driving an unprecedented increase in energy demand as each new data center gets built.

catalysts.event: Received certificate of occupancy and began moving operations to new 638,000-square-foot Mega Plant in Portland, Tennessee
catalysts.sentence: During the second half of 2025, we received a certificate of occupancy, and began to move operations to the new facility.

catalysts.event: Announced share repurchase program authorizing up to $150 million of Class A common stock with estimated completion by December 31, 2025
catalysts.sentence: On June 11, 2024, the Company announced a share repurchase program (the Repurchase Program) authorizing the repurchase of up to $150.0 million of the Company's Class A common stock, with an estimated completion date of December 31, 2025.
